name: 13 Best White label Reputation Management Software in 2026
header_text: 13 Best White label Reputation Management Software in 2026
table_description: Best White label Review Management Software
description:
On the lookout for new revenue opportunities for your business? A white-label reputation management tool will be a great addition to your portfolio of services. Customers these days are savvier than ever, and they're relying heavily on reviews and online feedback to make their purchasing decisions.

But here's the thing – for most small and medium companies out there, actively managing their reputation across all those review sites, social platforms, and websites is just not feasible. They're spread too thin, and their online rep is suffering because of it.

By offering a reputation management solution under your own brand, you can swoop in and save the day for these businesses. There are many ORM platforms in the industry not all of them offer white label services. So, we’ve created a white label software list for reputation management.

What You Should Look for in a White-label Reputation Management Software

As a reseller or agency, you need to work with a white-label ORM provider that can help you transition, scale, and grow efficiently. We assessed all these platforms based on various parameters that impact efficiency, scalability, and adaptability to your specific needs. Here are a few things we considered:

White-labeling & Branding

Make sure the platform allows you to brand every customer touchpoint, dashboards, reports, domains, with your own identity. This strengthens your agency’s positioning.

Review Monitoring & Responses

A good tool should let you aggregate and respond to reviews across platforms like Google, Facebook, Yelp, and industry-specific sites. AI-powered responses can also save time.

Review Generation & Campaigns

SMS, email, QR code campaigns, and on-site widgets are important for collecting new reviews. Look for automation features and CRM/POS integrations to simplify the process.

Analytics & Reporting

You need client-facing dashboards and internal insights to track reputation performance, sentiment trends, and ROI. Look for tools that offer attractive, white-labeled reports.

Integrations & Automation

Choose a platform that plugs into CRMs, marketing tools, or custom workflows. More integrations = more automation = more efficiency.

Scalability & Support

Whether you're handling 10 clients or 100, the platform should scale. Support should include onboarding help, training, and agency enablement resources.

‍

P.S. All the customer reviews and information for these platforms have been sourced first-hand from top review sites like G2, Capterra, and Trustpilot. We did the work, so you don’t have to.
sections: synup; vendasta-2; gatherup; soci-3; yext-2; reviewtrackers; grade-us; merchynt; embedmyreviews; reviewinc; reviewgrower; reviewshake; localclarity-ekisc
